LightningComponentBundle.description: Preview delete blast radius, child counts, and high-risk relationships.

property.name: showDeleteAction
property.label: Show Delete Action
property.description: Enable in-component delete execution after acknowledgment. Off by default for safer deployments.

property.name: showZeroCountRows
property.label: Show Zero-Count Rows
property.description: Show evaluated relationships even when the related record count is zero.

property.name: maxCountQueries
property.label: Maximum Count Queries
property.description: Upper bound for relationship count evaluation. Higher values inspect more children but consume more Apex queries.
